history.qwen_observation: Spring Boot 3 upgrade caused compilation errors because ResponseEntity.getStatusCode() now returns HttpStatusCode instead of HttpStatus
history.qwen_rationale: Adding the WidenHttpStatusToHttpStatusCode recipe to the SB3 upgrade step will widen HttpStatus variable declarations to HttpStatusCode, fixing the type incompatibility introduced by Spring 6's widened return type.
